# [Security] 4x: Route without authentication

## Security Vulnerability

**Rule:** `missing-auth`
**Findings:** 4

### Affected Files

- `src/app/api/copilotkit/route.ts` — Route without authentication: /api/copilotkit
- `src/app/api/exercises/convert/single/create/route.ts` — Route without authentication: /api/exercises/convert/single/create
- `src/app/api/exercises/convert/single/route.ts` — Route without authentication: /api/exercises/convert/single
- `src/app/api/lessons/convert-context/route.ts` — Route without authentication: /api/lessons/convert-context

### Details

```
Route has mutation methods (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) but no authentication
```

_3 additional files have the same issue._

task.json.L0: Title: Fix /api/copilotkit GET route missing authentication | Type: bugfix | Risk: low
task.json.L1:
- task_type: bugfix
- title: Fix /api/copilotkit GET route missing authentication
- description: The GET handler in /api/copilotkit/route.ts was not wrapped with withApiHandler, making it implicitly unauthenticated. Wrapped it with withApiHandler<undefined, undefined>({ auth: 'public' }) to explicitly mark it as a public health check endpoint. The other 3 flagged routes already have proper auth via withApiHandler with auth: 'admin' - the scanner has a false positive for those.
- scope: [1 items] src/app/api/copilotkit/route.ts
- risk_level: low
- questions: [0 items]
